title: CrowdStrike vs Cloudflare Pages
description: Compare CrowdStrike vs Cloudflare Pages — a security & compliance platform versus a developer tools solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: CrowdStrike (Security & Compliance) and Cloudflare Pages (Developer Tools) serve different primary purposes. CrowdStrike has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is security & compliance or developer tools capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between CrowdStrike and Cloudflare Pages?
faqs.answer: CrowdStrike is a security & compliance tool, while Cloudflare Pages is a developer tools platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can CrowdStrike replace Cloudflare Pages?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, CrowdStrike or Cloudflare Pages?
faqs.answer: CrowdStrike ($8-12/device/mo) and Cloudflare Pages (Free – $200/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
